03
⬡ E-Lab · HelpLab Phase

Challenge 3
HELP-LAB Community Impact

Hands-on engagement with the community to test ideas and create actionable impact.

● HelpLab Phase
◆ Challenge 3 Overview

The team worked directly with street vendors and community members to test early concepts of the digital marketplace.

Observations and interactive sessions helped the team understand usability, daily routines, and barriers to adoption.

Findings guided feature refinement, validated assumptions, and ensured the solution addressed real user needs.

Key Outputs
User Feedback — Insights collected from vendors and stakeholders.
Concept Testing — Tested ideas in real-world conditions.
Assumption Validation — Confirmed feasible and impactful features.
Feature Refinement — Adjusted designs based on practical usability insights.
